title: He Raised $26M Betting on Probabilities, Not Guesses | Koah Labs, Nic Baird
summary: Nic Baird, founder of Koah Labs, argues that ad-based monetization is a better model than subscriptions for AI tools and that human trust adoption, not technology, is the primary bottleneck limiting AI agent deployment. He also discusses applying probabilistic decision-making from competitive sailing to startup strategy.
